description: Grammar WASM pins. Each entry locks a specific grammar to an exact source commit and sha256 so it cannot drift via accidental re-download or auto-update. Only grammars that need pinning (e.g. known ABI issues with prebuilt downloads) are listed. Unlisted grammars remain free-floating.

sql.build_note: tree-sitter build --wasm fails with E2BIG (Argument list too long) on the 41MB generated parser.c. Direct wasi-sdk clang invocation bypasses the CLI process-spawning limit. wasi-sdk lives at ~/.cache/tree-sitter/wasi-sdk/bin/clang after tree-sitter CLI first use.
sql.pinned_reason: Prebuilt download from upstream GitHub release was ABI-incompatible with web-tree-sitter@0.26.9 runtime core (loaded OK but Parser.parse() crashed with RuntimeError: function signature mismatch). Must be built from source against the pinned CLI to ensure parse-driver ABI compatibility.
